title: Harness Engineering: What Separates Top Agentic Engineers Right Now
summary: Harness engineering is the practice of building control layers around coding agents, consisting of an AI layer for single-session rules and hooks, plus orchestration of multiple agent sessions into focused workflows. The approach emphasizes that harness components are more important than the underlying model itself.
